name: Accura Luxury 49 Motor Yacht
tagline: Perfect balance of luxury and practicality for medium groups
summary: The Accura 49 offers premium comfort for groups up to 12, ideal for sunset cruises and island hopping around Bali.
description: The Accura Luxury 49 Motor Yacht combines elegant design with practical functionality. Perfect for medium-sized groups seeking a luxurious yet intimate yachting experience around Bali's beautiful waters.
facilities: 1x Toilet with shower, 1x Berth, Sound System, Kitchen, WiFi, Snorkeling Equipment, Fishing Tools
safety: Sea Safe Tracking, Satellite Phone, Life Craft, Life Jackets, Insurance covered by Jasa Raharja Putra
included: Towels, Snorkeling accessories, Fishing equipment, Water, tea, coffee and non-alcoholic drinks
optionalExtras: Transfer, Diving accessories, Surfing accessories, Restaurant lunch at island, Professional photographer, DJ with equipment, Alcoholic drinks, Fresh fruits & snacks
pricingNotes: Nusa Dua 4hrs: Rp 25,000,000 | Nusa Penida/Lembongan 8hrs: Rp 30,000,000 | Lombok/Gili 8hrs: Rp 57,000,000
paymentPolicy: 50% deposit required. Full payment before trip. IDR currencies only.
cancellationPolicy: Low season: 50% within 7 days | High season: 50% within 30 days | Within 7 days: 100% | Weather: 25%
